productDisplayName: Timex Women Pearly White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular caseDial style: Pearly white dial with branding below the 12 hour mark, steel toned hands, black and steel toned markingsFeatures: Three face chronograph display, date display at the 4 hour mark, two push buttons and screw to reset the timeStrap style: Teal blue, textured leather strap with a tang clasp and two loops, has stitched detailWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
